title: Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (haccp)
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable quality workshop for applying HACCP requirements at work.
whyThisMatters: Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point (haccp) helps quality, operations, and process teams translate HACCP into daily routines, evidence, and improvement habits. The session covers Module 2 - Principles of HACCP, Determine critical control points, and Develop a flow diagram explaining the process so participants can support standards, audits, and process discipline with more confidence.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: Develop a flow diagram explaining the process

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
